811: export async function readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(
812:   env: Env,
813:   input: {
814:     sourceBundleKey: string;
815:     sandboxId: string;
816:     paths: string[];
817:     maxFileBytes?: number;
818:   }
819: ): Promise<ReviewSourceFileReadResult[]> {
820:   const maxFileBytes = parseIntegerString(env.REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_FILE_BYTES, DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_FILE_BYTES, 1_024, 200_000);
821:   const effectiveMaxFileBytes = typeof input.maxFileBytes === 'number' && Number.isFinite(input.maxFileBytes)
822:     ? Math.max(1_024, Math.min(maxFileBytes, Math.floor(input.maxFileBytes)))
823:     : maxFileBytes;
824: 
825:   if (!env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS && !env.SOURCE_BUNDLES) {
826:     throw new Error('WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS or SOURCE_BUNDLES binding is required for review context assembly');
827:   }
828:   const bundle =
829:     (env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null) ??
830:     (env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null);
831:   if (!bundle) {
832:     throw new Error(`Review source bundle not found: ${input.sourceBundleKey}`);
833:   }
834: 
835:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, input.sandboxId);
836:   try {
837:     await hydrateReviewSandbox(sandbox, await bundle.arrayBuffer());
838: 
839:     const policy: ReviewCommandPolicy = {
840:       commandAllow: [],
841:       commandDeny: [],
842:       maxCommandTimeoutMs: MAX_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS,
843:       maxOutputBytes: DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES,
844:       rootPath: WORKSPACE_ROOT,
845:     };
846: 
847:     const uniquePaths = Array.from(new Set(input.paths.map((path) => path.trim()).filter(Boolean)));
848:     const results: ReviewSourceFileReadResult[] = [];
849:     for (const path of uniquePaths) {
850:       const toolResult = await executeReviewTool(
851:         sandbox,
852:         { type: 'tool', tool: 'read_file', args: { path, maxBytes: effectiveMaxFileBytes } },
853:         policy,
854:         effectiveMaxFileBytes
855:       );
856:       const resultRecord = asRecord(toolResult.result);
857:       const error = typeof resultRecord.error === 'string' ? resultRecord.error : null;
858:       const content = typeof resultRecord.content === 'string' ? resultRecord.content : null;
859:       const bytes = typeof resultRecord.bytes === 'number' && Number.isFinite(resultRecord.bytes)
860:         ? Math.max(0, Math.floor(resultRecord.bytes))
861:         : 0;
862:       const truncated = Boolean(resultRecord.truncated);
863:       results.push({
864:         path,
865:         content,
866:         bytes,
867:         truncated,
868:         error,
869:       });
870:     }
871: 
872:     return results;
873:   } finally {
874:     if (typeof sandbox.destroy === 'function') {
875:       try {
876:         await sandbox.destroy();
877:       } catch {
878:         // Best-effort cleanup only.
879:       }
880:     }
881:   }
882: }

884: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentAgentAnalysis(
885:   env: Env,
886:   input: ReviewAgentPromptInput & {
887:     deploymentSandboxId: string;
888:     modelOverride?: string;
889:   }
890: ): Promise<ReviewAgentAnalysisResult | null> {
891:   const endpoint = (env.AGENT_SDK_URL ?? '').trim();
892:   if (!endpoint) {
893:     return null;
894:   }
895: 
896:   const model =
897:     readOptionalString(input.modelOverride) ??
898:     readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_MODEL) ??
899:     readOptionalString(env.AGENT_MODEL) ??
900:     DEFAULT_REVIEW_MODEL;
901:   const authToken = (env.AGENT_SDK_AUTH_TOKEN ?? '').trim() || null;
902:   let endpointHost: string | null = null;
903:   let endpointPath: string | null = null;
904:   try {
905:     const parsedEndpoint = new URL(endpoint);
906:     endpointHost = parsedEndpoint.host;
907:     endpointPath = parsedEndpoint.pathname;
908:   } catch {
909:     endpointHost = null;
910:     endpointPath = null;
911:   }
912:   const maxSteps = parseIntegerString(env.REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_STEPS, DEFAULT_REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_STEPS, 1, 12);
913:   const maxFileBytes = parseIntegerString(env.REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_FILE_BYTES, DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_FILE_BYTES, 1_024, 200_000);
914:   if (!env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS && !env.SOURCE_BUNDLES) {
915:     throw new Error('WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS or SOURCE_BUNDLES binding is required for review analysis');
916:   }
917:   const bundle =
918:     (env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null) ??
919:     (env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null);
920:   if (!bundle) {
921:     throw new Error(`Review source bundle not found: ${input.sourceBundleKey}`);
922:   }
923: 
924:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, input.deploymentSandboxId);
925:   try {
926:     await hydrateReviewSandbox(sandbox, await bundle.arrayBuffer());
927:     const { rootListing, diffSnapshot } = await snapshotInitialContext(sandbox, maxFileBytes);
928:     const prompt = buildReviewAgentPrompt(
929:       sanitizePromptInput({
930:         ...input,
931:         rootListing,
932:         diffSnapshot,
933:       })
934:     );
935:     if (input.onLifecycleEvent) {
936:       await input.onLifecycleEvent('review_analysis_prompt_built', {
937:         reviewContextId: input.reviewContext.id,
938:       });
939:     }
940: 
941:     const provider = new CloudflareAgentSdkReviewProvider(endpoint, authToken);
942:     const policy: ReviewCommandPolicy = {
943:       commandAllow: [],
944:       commandDeny: ['git ', 'rm ', 'npm ', 'pnpm ', 'yarn ', 'bun ', 'mkdir ', 'mv ', 'cp ', 'touch '],
945:       maxCommandTimeoutMs: MAX_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS,
946:       maxOutputBytes: DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES,
947:       rootPath: WORKSPACE_ROOT,
948:     };
949: 
950:     const history: ReviewAgentHistoryEntry[] = [];
951:     const usedTools: string[] = [];
952:     let finalValidationError: ReviewAgentOutputError | null = null;
953:     let repairAttempted = false;
954:     let repairSucceeded = false;
955:     let firstPassValid = false;
956:     let validationErrorCount = 0;
957:     let dedupedExactCount = 0;
958:     let fallbackApplied = false;
959:     let fallbackReason: string | null = null;
960:     for (let step = 1; step <= maxSteps; step += 1) {
961:       if (input.onLifecycleEvent) {
962:         await input.onLifecycleEvent('review_analysis_provider_request_started', {
963:           step,
964:           endpointHost,
965:           endpointPath,
966:           hasAuthToken: Boolean(authToken),
967:         });
968:       }
969:       const action = await provider.next({
970:         prompt,
971:         model,
972:         maxSteps,
973:         step,
974:         history,
975:       });
976: 
977:       if (action.type === 'final') {

72: function asRecord(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
73:   return value && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value) ? (value as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
74: }
75: 
76: function parseStringArray(value: unknown): string[] {
77:   return Array.isArray(value) ? value.filter((item): item is string => typeof item === 'string') : [];

79:

81:   return Array.from(new Set(values.map((value) => value.trim()).filter(Boolean)));

85:   return typeof value === 'boolean' ? value : fallback;

89:   if (typeof value !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(value)) {

92:   return Math.max(1, Math.min(max, Math.floor(value)));

100:   const redacted = value
101:     .replace(/(authorization:\s*bearer\s+)[a-z0-9._-]+/gi, '$1[REDACTED]')
102:     .replace(GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN, '[REDACTED_TOKEN]')
103:     .replace(/(api[_-]?key\s*[:=]\s*)([^\s,]+)/gi, '$1[REDACTED]')
104:     .replace(/(token\s*[:=]\s*)([^\s,]+)/gi, '$1[REDACTED]');

146:   const provenanceLines: string[] = [];
147:   if (report.provenance.promptSummary) {
148:     provenanceLines.push(report.provenance.promptSummary);
149:   }
150:   if (report.provenance.sessionIds.length > 0) {
151:     provenanceLines.push(`Sessions: ${report.provenance.sessionIds.join(', ')}`);
152:   }
153:   if (report.provenance.contextResolution?.contextResolution === 'branch_fallback') {
154:     provenanceLines.push(
155:       `Context resolution: branch fallback from checkpoint ${report.provenance.contextResolution.originalCheckpointId} to ${report.provenance.contextResolution.resolvedCheckpointId} (${report.provenance.contextResolution.resolvedCommitSha.slice(0, 12)}).`
156:     );

202: function mergeFindings(primary: ReviewFinding[], secondary: ReviewFinding[]): ReviewFinding[] {

238:       ];
239:     }
240:     if (event.eventType === 'validation_skipped') {
241:       const step = typeof eventPayload.step === 'string' ? eventPayload.step : 'validation';
242:       return [
243:         {
244:           severity: 'low',
245:           category: 'style',
246:           passType: 'single',
247:           locations: [{ filePath: 'deployment', startLine: null, endLine: null }],
248:           description: `Nimbus skipped ${step} validation while preparing this deployment review.`,
249:           suggestedFix: `Run the ${step} validation in the deployment path or document why it is intentionally skipped.`,
250:         },
251:       ];
252:     }
253:     if (event.eventType === 'deployment_toolchain_unknown_fallback') {
254:       return [
255:         {
256:           severity: 'low',
257:           category: 'style',
258:           passType: 'single',
259:           locations: [{ filePath: 'deployment', startLine: null, endLine: null }],
260:           description: 'Deployment completed after a toolchain fallback, which may hide package-manager-specific issues.',
261:           suggestedFix: 'Declare an explicit package manager and lockfile so future deploys and reviews use deterministic tooling.',
262:         },
263:       ];
264:     }
265:     return [];
266:   });
267: }

269: function buildEvidence(
270:   deploymentEvents: Array<{ eventType: string; payload: unknown; seq: number }>,
271:   deployment: { deployedUrl: string | null },
272:   resultArtifact: Record<string, unknown>,
273:   includeValidationEvidence: boolean,
274:   agentEvidence?: ReviewEvidenceItem | null
275: ): ReviewEvidenceItem[] {
276:   const evidence: ReviewEvidenceItem[] = includeValidationEvidence
277:     ? deploymentEvents
278:         .filter((event) => {
279:           return [
280:             'validation_started',
281:             'validation_skipped',
282:             'deployment_validation_tool_missing',
283:             'deployment_provider_created',
284:             'deployment_provider_status',
285:             'deployment_succeeded',
286:           ].includes(event.eventType);
287:         })
288:         .map((event) => ({
289:           id: `ev_${event.seq}`,
290:           type: event.eventType,
291:           label: event.eventType.replaceAll('_', ' '),
292:           status: statusFromEventType(event.eventType, asRecord(event.payload)),
293:           metadata: asRecord(event.payload),
294:         }))
295:     : [];
296: 
297:   if (includeValidationEvidence && deployment.deployedUrl) {
298:     evidence.push({
299:       id: 'ev_deployed_url',
300:       type: 'deploy_probe',
301:       label: 'Deployed URL present',
302:       status: 'passed',
303:       metadata: { url: deployment.deployedUrl },
304:     });
305:   }
306:   if (
307:     includeValidationEvidence &&
308:     (typeof resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey === 'string' || typeof resultArtifact.sourceSnapshotSha256 === 'string')
309:   ) {
310:     evidence.push({
311:       id: 'ev_artifact',
312:       type: 'artifact',
313:       label: 'Deployment artifact recorded',
314:       status: 'info',
315:       metadata: resultArtifact,
316:     });
317:   }
318:   if (agentEvidence) {
319:     evidence.push(agentEvidence);
320:   }
321: 
322:   return evidence;
323: }
324: 
325: function deriveRiskLevel(findings: ReviewFinding[], fallback: ReviewSeverity = 'low'): ReviewSeverity {
326:   if (findings.some((finding) => finding.severity === 'critical')) {
327:     return 'critical';
328:   }
329:   if (findings.some((finding) => finding.severity === 'high')) {
330:     return 'high';
331:   }
332:   if (findings.some((finding) => finding.severity === 'medium')) {
333:     return 'medium';
334:   }
335:   if (findings.some((finding) => finding.severity === 'low')) {
336:     return 'low';
337:   }
338:   return fallback;
339: }
340: 
341: function deriveRecommendation(findings: ReviewFinding[]): ReviewRecommendation {
342:   const riskLevel = deriveRiskLevel(findings);
343:   if (riskLevel === 'critical' || riskLevel === 'high') {
344:     return 'request_changes';
345:   }
346:   if (riskLevel === 'medium' || riskLevel === 'low') {
347:     return findings.length > 0 ? 'comment' : 'approve';
348:   }
349:   return 'approve';
350: }

352: function sanitizeIntentBlock(intent: {
353:   goal: string | null;
354:   constraints: string[];
355:   decisions: string[];
356: }): { goal: string | null; constraints: string[]; decisions: string[] } {
357:   return {
358:     goal: redactReviewText(intent.goal),
359:     constraints: intent.constraints.map((item) => redactReviewText(item) ?? '').filter(Boolean),
360:     decisions: intent.decisions.map((item) => redactReviewText(item) ?? '').filter(Boolean),
361:   };
362: }

364: function parseChangedPathsFromDiff(patch: string): string[] {
365:   const paths = new Set<string>();
366:   for (const line of patch.split('\n')) {
367:     if (!line.startsWith('+++ ')) {
368:       continue;
369:     }
370:     const raw = line.slice(4).trim();
371:     if (!raw || raw === '/dev/null') {
372:       continue;
373:     }
374:     const normalized = raw.replace(/^b\//, '').replace(/^\.\//, '').trim();
375:     if (!normalized || normalized === '/dev/null') {
376:       continue;
377:     }
378:     paths.add(normalized);
379:   }
380:   return Array.from(paths);
381: }
382: 
383: function parseDiffHunks(patch: string): Array<{ path: string; patch: string }> {
384:   const lines = patch.split('\n');
385:   const hunks: Array<{ path: string; patch: string }> = [];
386:   let currentPath: string | null = null;
387:   let currentLines: string[] = [];
388: 
389:   const flush = () => {
390:     if (!currentPath) {
391:       return;
392:     }
393:     hunks.push({
394:       path: currentPath,
395:       patch: currentLines.join('\n').trim(),
396:     });
397:   };
398: 
399:   for (const line of lines) {
400:     if (line.startsWith('+++ ')) {
401:       flush();
402:       const raw = line.slice(4).trim();
403:       currentPath = raw.replace(/^b\//, '').replace(/^\.\//, '').trim();
404:       currentLines = [line];
405:       continue;
406:     }
407:     if (currentPath) {
408:       currentLines.push(line);
409:     }
410:   }
411: 
412:   flush();
413:   return hunks.filter((hunk) => hunk.path && hunk.path !== '/dev/null');
414: }
415: 
416: function parentDirectories(path: string): string[] {
417:   const parts = path.split('/').filter(Boolean);
418:   const dirs = [''];
419:   let current = '';
420:   for (let index = 0; index < parts.length - 1; index += 1) {
421:     current = current ? `${current}/${parts[index]}` : parts[index] as string;
422:     dirs.push(current);
423:   }
424:   return dirs;
425: }

427: const CONVENTION_PATTERNS = [
428:   'AGENTS.md',
429:   'CODE_REVIEW.md',
430:   'CONTRIBUTING.md',
431:   '.editorconfig',
432:   '.eslintrc',
433:   '.eslintrc.js',
434:   '.eslintrc.cjs',
435:   '.eslintrc.json',
436:   '.eslintrc.yaml',
437:   '.eslintrc.yml',
438:   'eslint.config.js',
439:   'eslint.config.mjs',
440:   'eslint.config.cjs',
441:   'biome.json',
442:   'biome.jsonc',
443:   'prettier.config.js',
444:   'prettier.config.mjs',
445:   'prettier.config.cjs',
446:   '.prettierrc',
447:   '.prettierrc.json',
448:   '.prettierrc.yaml',
449:   '.prettierrc.yml',
450:   'pyproject.toml',
451:   'ruff.toml',
452:   'mypy.ini',
453:   'tsconfig.json',
454:   'tsconfig.base.json',
455:   'tsconfig.app.json',
456:   'tsconfig.node.json',
457: ] as const;
458: 
459: function discoverConventionCandidates(changedPaths: string[], maxCount = 10): string[] {
460:   const candidates = new Set<string>();
461:   for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
462:     const dirs = parentDirectories(changedPath);
463:     for (const dir of dirs) {
464:       for (const pattern of CONVENTION_PATTERNS) {
465:         const candidate = dir ? `${dir}/${pattern}` : pattern;
466:         candidates.add(candidate);
467:         if (candidates.size >= maxCount * 6) {
468:           return Array.from(candidates);
469:         }
470:       }
471:     }
472:   }
473:   return Array.from(candidates);
474: }

476: function estimateTokenCount(parts: string[]): number {
477:   const chars = parts.reduce((total, part) => total + part.length, 0);
478:   return Math.ceil(chars / 4);
479: }

481: function readOptionalString(value: unknown): string | null {
482:   return typeof value === 'string' && value.trim() ? value.trim() : null;
483: }
484: 
485: function readOptionalNumber(value: unknown): number | null {
486:   return typeof value === 'number' && Number.isFinite(value) ? value : null;
487: }
488: 
489: function stripSensitiveTokenFields(value: unknown): unknown {
490:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
491:     return value.map((item) => stripSensitiveTokenFields(item));
492:   }
493:   if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') {
494:     if (typeof value === 'string' && GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN_TEST.test(value)) {
495:       return value.replace(GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN, '[REDACTED_TOKEN]');
496:     }
497:     return value;
498:   }
499:   const record = value as Record<string, unknown>;
500:   return Object.entries(record).reduce<Record<string, unknown>>((result, [key, nested]) => {
501:     const normalizedKey = key.toLowerCase();
502:     if (
503:       normalizedKey === 'x-review-github-token' ||
504:       normalizedKey === 'review_context_github_token' ||
505:       normalizedKey === 'authorization'
506:     ) {
507:       return result;
508:     }
509:     result[key] = stripSensitiveTokenFields(nested);
510:     return result;
511:   }, {});
512: }

514: function resolveReviewAnalysisModel(payload: Record<string, unknown>, env: Env): string {
515:   const requested = readOptionalString(payload.model);
516:   if (requested) {
517:     return requested;
518:   }
519:   const reviewModel = readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_MODEL);
520:   if (reviewModel) {
521:     return reviewModel;
522:   }
523:   const agentModel = readOptionalString(env.AGENT_MODEL);
524:   if (agentModel) {
525:     return agentModel;
526:   }
527:   return DEFAULT_REVIEW_MODEL;
528: }

530: function mergeProvenance(
531:   deploymentProvenance: Record<string, unknown>,
532:   reviewProvenance: Record<string, unknown>
533: ): Record<string, unknown> {
534:   const merged: Record<string, unknown> = {
535:     ...deploymentProvenance,
536:     ...reviewProvenance,
537:   };
538: 
539:   const deploymentSessionIds = parseStringArray(deploymentProvenance.sessionIds);
540:   const reviewSessionIds = parseStringArray(reviewProvenance.sessionIds);
541:   const mergedSessionIds = Array.from(new Set([...deploymentSessionIds, ...reviewSessionIds]));
542:   if (mergedSessionIds.length > 0) {
543:     merged.sessionIds = mergedSessionIds;
544:   }
545: 
546:   const deploymentIntent = parseStringArray(deploymentProvenance.intentSessionContext);
547:   const reviewIntent = parseStringArray(reviewProvenance.intentSessionContext);
548:   const mergedIntent = Array.from(new Set([...deploymentIntent, ...reviewIntent]));
549:   if (mergedIntent.length > 0) {
550:     merged.intentSessionContext = mergedIntent;
551:   }
552: 
553:   return merged;
554: }
555: 
556: function parseTouchedFilesFromMetadata(record: Record<string, unknown>): string[] {
557:   const candidates = [record.touchedFiles, record.touched_files, record.files_touched, record.changedFiles, record.changed_files, record.files];
558:   for (const candidate of candidates) {
559:     if (!Array.isArray(candidate)) {
560:       continue;
561:     }
562:     const parsed = candidate
563:       .flatMap((item) => {
564:         if (typeof item === 'string') {
565:           return [item.trim()];
566:         }
567:         const entry = asRecord(item);
568:         const path = readOptionalString(entry.path);
569:         return path ? [path] : [];
570:       })
571:       .filter(Boolean);
572:     if (parsed.length > 0) {
573:       return parsed;
574:     }
575:   }
576:   return [];
577: }

579: function buildGitHubHeaders(githubToken: string): Record<string, string> {
580:   const headers: Record<string, string> = {
581:     Accept: 'application/vnd.github+json',
582:     'X-GitHub-Api-Version': '2022-11-28',
583:     'User-Agent': 'nimbus-worker/1.0',
584:   };
585:   headers.Authorization = githubToken.toLowerCase().startsWith('bearer ') ? githubToken : `Bearer ${githubToken}`;
586:   return headers;
587: }
588: 
589: async function fetchGitHubJson(url: string, githubToken: string): Promise<Record<string, unknown>> {
590:   const response = await fetch(url, {
591:     headers: buildGitHubHeaders(githubToken),
592:   });
593: 
594:   if (!response.ok) {
595:     const rateLimited =
596:       response.status === 429 ||
597:       (response.status === 403 && (response.headers.get('x-ratelimit-remaining') ?? '').trim() === '0');
598:     const responseBody = redactReviewText(await response.text());
599:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
600:       'review_context_github_api_error',
601:       `GitHub API request failed (${response.status}) for ${url}${rateLimited ? ' [rate_limited]' : ''}`,
602:       responseBody
603:     );
604:   }
605: 
606:   const data = (await response.json()) as unknown;
607:   return asRecord(data);
608: }
609: 
610: async function fetchGitHubArray(url: string, githubToken: string): Promise<unknown[]> {
611:   const response = await fetch(url, {
612:     headers: buildGitHubHeaders(githubToken),
613:   });
614: 
615:   if (!response.ok) {
616:     const rateLimited =
617:       response.status === 429 ||
618:       (response.status === 403 && (response.headers.get('x-ratelimit-remaining') ?? '').trim() === '0');
619:     const responseBody = redactReviewText(await response.text());
620:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
621:       'review_context_github_api_error',
622:       `GitHub API request failed (${response.status}) for ${url}${rateLimited ? ' [rate_limited]' : ''}`,
623:       responseBody
624:     );
625:   }
626: 
627:   const data = (await response.json()) as unknown;
628:   return Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];
629: }

631: function classifyCochangeSkipReason(error: unknown): string {
632:   if (error instanceof ReviewContextAssemblyError && /\[rate_limited\]/.test(error.message)) {
633:     return 'rate_limited';
634:   }
635:   return 'github_api_error';
636: }
637: 
638: async function fetchCochangeFromCheckpointBranch(
639:   repo: string,
640:   changedPaths: string[],
641:   lookbackSessions: number,
642:   githubToken: string
643: ): Promise<{
644:   relatedByChangedPath: Record<string, Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>>;
645:   sessionsScanned: number;
646: }> {
647:   const commits = await fetchGitHubArray(`https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}/commits?sha=entire/checkpoints/v1&per_page=${lookbackSessions}`, githubToken);
648: 
649:   const frequencyByChangedPath = new Map<string, Map<string, { count: number; sessions: Set<string> }>>();
650:   for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
651:     frequencyByChangedPath.set(changedPath, new Map());
652:   }
653:   let sessionsScanned = 0;
654: 
655:   for (const commit of commits.slice(0, lookbackSessions)) {
656:     const commitRecord = asRecord(commit);
657:     const sha = readOptionalString(commitRecord.sha);
658:     if (!sha) {
659:       continue;
660:     }
661: 
662:     const detail = await fetchGitHubJson(`https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}/commits/${sha}`, githubToken);
663:     const files = Array.isArray(detail.files) ? detail.files : [];
664:     const metadataPaths = files
665:       .map((entry) => readOptionalString(asRecord(entry).filename))
666:       .filter((path): path is string => Boolean(path && path.endsWith('/metadata.json')))
667:       .slice(0, 3);
668: 
669:     const touchedFiles = new Set<string>();
670:     for (const metadataPath of metadataPaths) {
671:       const file = await fetchGitHubJson(`https://api.github.com/repos/${repo}/contents/${metadataPath}?ref=${sha}`, githubToken);
672:       const content = readOptionalString(file.content);
673:       if (!content) {
674:         continue;
675:       }
676:       let decoded = '';
677:       try {
678:         decoded = atob(content.replace(/\n/g, ''));
679:       } catch {
680:         continue;
681:       }
682:       try {
683:         const metadata = JSON.parse(decoded) as unknown;
684:         for (const path of parseTouchedFilesFromMetadata(asRecord(metadata))) {
685:           touchedFiles.add(path);
686:         }
687:       } catch {
688:         continue;
689:       }
690:     }
691: 
692:     if (touchedFiles.size === 0) {
693:       continue;
694:     }
695: 
696:     sessionsScanned += 1;
697:     for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
698:       if (!touchedFiles.has(changedPath)) {
699:         continue;
700:       }
701:       const frequency = frequencyByChangedPath.get(changedPath);
702:       if (!frequency) {
703:         continue;
704:       }
705:       for (const path of touchedFiles) {
706:         if (path === changedPath) {
707:           continue;
708:         }
709:         const next = frequency.get(path) ?? { count: 0, sessions: new Set<string>() };
710:         next.count += 1;
711:         next.sessions.add(sha);
712:         frequency.set(path, next);
713:       }
714:     }
715:   }
716: 
717:   const relatedByChangedPath: Record<string, Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>> = {};
718:   for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
719:     const frequency =
720:       frequencyByChangedPath.get(changedPath) ?? new Map<string, { count: number; sessions: Set<string> }>();
721:     relatedByChangedPath[changedPath] = Array.from(frequency.entries())
722:       .map(([path, value]) => ({
723:         path,
724:         frequency: value.count,
725:         sessionIds: Array.from(value.sessions),
726:       }))
727:       .sort((left, right) => right.frequency - left.frequency);
728:   }
729: 
730:   return {
731:     relatedByChangedPath,
732:     sessionsScanned,
733:   };
734: }
735: 
736: async function assembleReviewContextBootstrap(
737:   env: Env,
738:   review: ReviewRunResponse,
739:   reviewPayload: Record<string, unknown>,
740:   options?: ReviewRunExecutionOptions
741: ): Promise<ReviewContext> {
742:   const COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS = 5;
743:   const COCHANGE_TOP_N = 20;
744:   const CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT = 10;
745: 
746:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
747:     reviewId: review.id,
748:     eventType: 'review_context_assembly_started',
749:     payload: {
750:       source: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
751:     },
752:   });
753: 
754:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, review.workspaceId);
755:   const checkpointId = workspace?.checkpointId?.trim() ?? '';
756:   if (!checkpointId) {
757:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
758:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
759:       'Review context assembly requires an Entire checkpoint-backed workspace with a checkpointId.'
760:     );
761:   }
762: 
763:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId);
764:   if (!deployment) {
765:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError('review_context_deployment_not_found', `Deployment ${review.deploymentId} was not found.`);
766:   }
767: 
768:   const deploymentRequest = (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, review.deploymentId)) ?? {};
769:   const deploymentRequestProvenance = asRecord(deploymentRequest.provenance);
770:   const reviewRequestProvenance = asRecord(reviewPayload.provenance);
771:   const requestProvenance = mergeProvenance(deploymentRequestProvenance, reviewRequestProvenance);
772:   const sessionIds = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds));
773:   if (sessionIds.length === 0) {
774:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
775:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
776:       'Review context assembly requires at least one Entire sessionId in deployment provenance.'
777:     );
778:   }
779: 
780:   const sessionId = sessionIds[0] ?? '';
781:   const sessionIntentCandidates = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.intentSessionContext));
782:   const sessionIntent = sessionIntentCandidates[0] ?? null;
783:   const attributionTrailer = readOptionalString(requestProvenance.attributionTrailer);
784:   const agentType = readOptionalString(requestProvenance.agentType);
785:   const requestedTokenBudget =
786:     readOptionalNumber(requestProvenance.reviewContextTokenBudget) ??
787:     readOptionalNumber(requestProvenance.contextTokenBudget) ??
788:     null;
789:   const configuredTokenBudget = readOptionalNumber(env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_DEFAULT_TOKEN_BUDGET);
790:   const tokenBudget = requestedTokenBudget ?? configuredTokenBudget ?? null;
791: 
792:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
793:     reviewId: review.id,
794:     eventType: 'review_context_checkpoint_context_collected',
795:     payload: {
796:       checkpointId,
797:       sessionId,
798:       sessionCount: sessionIds.length,
799:       hasSessionIntent: Boolean(sessionIntent),
800:     },
801:   });
802: 
803:   const result = asRecord(deployment.result);
804:   const resultProvenance = asRecord(result.provenance);
805:   const resultArtifact = asRecord(result.artifact);
806:   const provenanceOperationId = typeof resultProvenance.operationId === 'string'
807:     ? resultProvenance.operationId
808:     : typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
809:       ? requestProvenance.operationId
810:       : null;
811:   const reviewDiffArtifactId = typeof resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
812:     ? resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId
813:     : typeof resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
814:       ? resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
815:       : typeof requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
816:         ? requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
817:         : null;
818: 
819:   const authoritativeDiff = await loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
820:     env,
821:     review.workspaceId,
822:     provenanceOperationId,
823:     reviewDiffArtifactId
824:   );
825:   const commitDiffPatch = readOptionalString(requestProvenance.commitDiffPatch);
826:   const authoritativeDiffPatch = readOptionalString(authoritativeDiff?.patch);
827:   const diffPatch = authoritativeDiffPatch ?? commitDiffPatch ?? null;
828:   if (!diffPatch) {
829:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
830:       'review_context_diff_missing',
831:       'Review context assembly requires non-empty diff patch context. Ensure deployment provenance includes review diff artifact or commit diff patch.'
832:     );
833:   }
834:   const changedPaths = diffPatch ? parseChangedPathsFromDiff(diffPatch) : [];
835:   const diffHunks = diffPatch ? parseDiffHunks(diffPatch) : [];
836: 
837:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
838:     reviewId: review.id,
839:     eventType: 'review_context_diff_collected',
840:     payload: {
841:       source: authoritativeDiffPatch ? authoritativeDiff?.source ?? null : commitDiffPatch ? 'commit_patch' : null,
842:       artifactId: authoritativeDiffPatch ? authoritativeDiff?.artifactId ?? null : null,
843:       hasDiff: Boolean(diffPatch),
844:       patchBytes: diffPatch ? new TextEncoder().encode(diffPatch).byteLength : 0,
845:       fallbackUsed: !authoritativeDiffPatch && Boolean(commitDiffPatch),
846:     },
847:   });
848: 
849:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
850:     reviewId: review.id,
851:     eventType: 'review_context_changed_files_collected',
852:     payload: {
853:       changedFileCount: changedPaths.length,
854:     },
855:   });
856: 
857:   const deploymentSourceBundleKey =
858:     typeof resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey === 'string' && resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
859:       ? resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
860:       : deployment.sourceBundleKey ?? null;
861:   if (!deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
862:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
863:       'review_context_source_bundle_missing',
864:       'Review context assembly requires deployment source bundle key.'
865:     );
866:   }
867: 
868:   const changedFileReads = changedPaths.length
869:     ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
870:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
871:         sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-changed`,
872:         paths: changedPaths,
873:       })
874:     : [];
875:   const changedFiles = changedFileReads
876:     .filter((item) => item.content !== null && !item.error)
877:     .map((item) => ({
878:       path: item.path,
879:       content: item.content ?? '',
880:       byteSize: item.bytes,
881:       source: 'changed' as const,
882:     }));
883: 
884:   const conventionCandidates = discoverConventionCandidates(changedPaths, CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT);
885:   const conventionReads = conventionCandidates.length
886:     ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
887:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
888:         sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-conventions`,
889:         paths: conventionCandidates,
890:       })
891:     : [];
892:   const conventionFiles = conventionReads
893:     .filter((item) => item.content !== null && !item.error)
894:     .slice(0, CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT)
895:     .map((item) => ({
896:       path: item.path,
897:       content: item.content ?? '',
898:       byteSize: item.bytes,
899:       source: 'convention' as const,
900:     }));
901: 
902:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
903:     reviewId: review.id,
904:     eventType: 'review_context_conventions_collected',
905:     payload: {
906:       candidateCount: conventionCandidates.length,
907:       conventionFileCount: conventionFiles.length,
908:       maxCount: CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT,
909:     },
910:   });
911: 
912:   const repoSlug =
913:     readOptionalString(requestProvenance.repo) ??
914:     readOptionalString(requestProvenance.repository) ??
915:     readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_REPO);
916:   if (!repoSlug) {
917:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
918:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
919:       'Review context assembly requires repository slug in deployment provenance (provenance.repo).'
920:     );
921:   }
922:   let relatedFiles: Array<{
923:     path: string;
924:     content: string;
925:     byteSize: number;
926:     source: 'related';
927:     score: number;
928:     coChangeFrequency: number;
929:     supportingSessionIds: string[];
930:   }> = [];
931:   let sessionsScanned = 0;
932:   let coChangeSkipped = false;
933:   let coChangeSkipReason: string | null = null;
934:   let coChangeAvailable = false;
935:   const githubToken = readOptionalString(options?.cochangeGithubToken) ?? readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN);
936: 
937:   if (!githubToken) {
938:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
939:       'review_context_github_token_missing',
940:       'co-change retrieval requires a GitHub token - set REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN in your local .env'
941:     );
942:   } else {
943:     try {
944:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
945:         reviewId: review.id,
946:         eventType: 'review_context_cochange_lookup_started',
947:         payload: {
948:           repo: repoSlug,
949:           lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
950:         },
951:       });
952: 
953:       const relatedFrequency = new Map<string, { frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>();
954:       const entriesByChangedPath = new Map<string, Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>>();
955:       const changedPathsMissingCache: string[] = [];
956:       for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
957:         const cached = await getReviewCochangeCache(env.DB, {
958:           filePath: changedPath,
959:           repo: repoSlug,
960:         });
961:         const entries = cached?.cochange;
962:         const cachedLookbackSessions = cached?.lookbackSessions ?? null;
963:         if (entries && cachedLookbackSessions === COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS) {
964:           entriesByChangedPath.set(changedPath, entries);
965:         } else {
966:           changedPathsMissingCache.push(changedPath);
967:         }
968:       }
969: 
970:       if (changedPathsMissingCache.length > 0) {
971:         const fetched = await fetchCochangeFromCheckpointBranch(repoSlug, changedPathsMissingCache, COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS, githubToken);
972:         sessionsScanned += fetched.sessionsScanned;
973:         for (const changedPath of changedPathsMissingCache) {
974:           const entries = fetched.relatedByChangedPath[changedPath] ?? [];
975:           entriesByChangedPath.set(changedPath, entries);
976:           await upsertReviewCochangeCache(env.DB, {
977:             filePath: changedPath,
978:             repo: repoSlug,
979:             branch: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
980:             cochange: entries,
981:             lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
982:           });
983:         }
984:       }
985: 
986:       for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
987:         const entries = entriesByChangedPath.get(changedPath) ?? [];
988:         for (const entry of entries) {
989:           const existing = relatedFrequency.get(entry.path) ?? { frequency: 0, sessionIds: [] };
990:           existing.frequency += entry.frequency;
991:           existing.sessionIds = Array.from(new Set([...existing.sessionIds, ...entry.sessionIds]));
992:           relatedFrequency.set(entry.path, existing);
993:         }
994:       }
995: 
996:       const changedPathSet = new Set(changedPaths);
997:       const rankedRelated = Array.from(relatedFrequency.entries())
998:         .map(([path, value]) => ({ path, ...value }))
999:         .filter((item) => !changedPathSet.has(item.path))
1000:         .sort((left, right) => right.frequency - left.frequency)
1001:         .slice(0, COCHANGE_TOP_N);
1002: 
1003:       const relatedReads = rankedRelated.length
1004:         ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
1005:             sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
1006:             sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-related`,
1007:             paths: rankedRelated.map((item) => item.path),
1008:           })
1009:         : [];
1010:       const readByPath = new Map(relatedReads.map((item) => [item.path, item]));
1011:       relatedFiles = rankedRelated
1012:         .flatMap((item) => {
1013:           const read = readByPath.get(item.path);
1014:           if (!read || read.content === null || read.error) {
1015:             return [];
1016:           }
1017:           return [
1018:             {
1019:               path: item.path,
1020:               content: read.content,
1021:               byteSize: read.bytes,
1022:               source: 'related' as const,
1023:               score: item.frequency,
1024:               coChangeFrequency: item.frequency,
1025:               supportingSessionIds: item.sessionIds,
1026:             },
1027:           ];
1028:         });
1029:       coChangeAvailable = relatedFiles.length > 0;
1030: 
1031:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1032:         reviewId: review.id,
1033:         eventType: 'review_context_cochange_lookup_completed',
1034:         payload: {
1035:           repo: repoSlug,
1036:           relatedFileCount: relatedFiles.length,
1037:           topN: COCHANGE_TOP_N,
1038:         },
1039:       });
1040:     } catch (error) {
1041:       const reason = classifyCochangeSkipReason(error);
1042:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1043:         reviewId: review.id,
1044:         eventType: 'review_context_cochange_failed',
1045:         payload: {
1046:           reason,
1047:           repo: repoSlug,
1048:           lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
1049:           githubResponseBody:
1050:             error instanceof ReviewContextAssemblyError ? error.details : redactReviewText(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)),
1051:         },
1052:       });
1053:       if (error instanceof ReviewContextAssemblyError) {
1054:         throw error;
1055:       }
1056:       throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
1057:         'review_context_github_api_error',
1058:         `Co-change context retrieval failed (${reason}).`
1059:       );
1060:     }
1061:   }
1062: 
1063:   const assembledAt = new Date().toISOString();
1064:   const contextId = generateReviewContextId();
1065:   const contextPayload: ReviewContext = {
1066:     id: contextId,
1067:     reviewId: review.id,
1068:     workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
1069:     deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
1070:     commitSha: workspace?.commitSha ?? '',
1071:     assembledAt,
1072:     checkpoint: {
1073:       checkpointId,
1074:       branch: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
1075:       attributionTrailer,
1076:       session: {
1077:         sessionId,
1078:         agentType,
1079:         sessionIntent,
1080:       },
1081:     },
1082:     retrieval: {
1083:       changedFiles,
1084:       diffHunks,
1085:       relatedFiles,
1086:       conventionFiles,
1087:       coChange: {
1088:         source: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
1089:         lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
1090:         sessionsScanned,
1091:         filesConsidered: changedPaths.length,
1092:         topN: COCHANGE_TOP_N,
1093:         coChangeSkipped,
1094:         coChangeSkipReason,
1095:         coChangeAvailable,
1096:       },
1097:     },
1098:     stats: {
1099:       totalFilesIncluded: changedFiles.length + relatedFiles.length + conventionFiles.length,
1100:       totalBytesIncluded:
1101:         changedFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0) +
1102:         relatedFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0) +
1103:         conventionFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0),
1104:       estimatedTokens: estimateTokenCount([
1105:         diffPatch ?? '',
1106:         ...changedFiles.map((item) => item.content),
1107:         ...relatedFiles.map((item) => item.content),
1108:         ...conventionFiles.map((item) => item.content),
1109:       ]),
1110:       tokenBudget,
1111:     },
1112:   };
1113: 
1114:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1115:     reviewId: review.id,
1116:     eventType: 'review_context_budget_checked',
1117:     payload: {
1118:       estimatedTokens: contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens,
1119:       tokenBudget,
1120:       tokenBudgetSource:
1121:         requestedTokenBudget !== null
1122:           ? 'request_provenance'
1123:           : configuredTokenBudget !== null
1124:             ? 'configured_env'
1125:             : 'unconfigured',
1126:       exceeded: tokenBudget !== null && contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens > tokenBudget,
1127:     },
1128:   });
1129: 
1130:   if (tokenBudget !== null && contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens > tokenBudget) {
1131:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
1132:       'review_context_budget_exceeded',
1133:       `ReviewContext estimated token usage (${contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens}) exceeds configured budget (${tokenBudget}). Increase the budget and retry.`
1134:     );
1135:   }
1136: 
1137:   const storageBucketCandidates = [env.REVIEW_CONTEXTS, env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS, env.SOURCE_BUNDLES];
1138:   const storageBucket = storageBucketCandidates.find(
1139:     (bucket): bucket is R2Bucket => Boolean(bucket && typeof bucket.put === 'function')
1140:   );
1141:   if (!storageBucket) {
1142:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
1143:       'review_context_storage_unavailable',
1144:       'REVIEW_CONTEXTS, WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS, or SOURCE_BUNDLES R2 binding is required for review context assembly.'
1145:     );
1146:   }
1147: 
1148:   const r2Key = `review-context/${review.id}/${contextId}.json`;
1149:   const serialized = JSON.stringify(stripSensitiveTokenFields(contextPayload));
1150:   await storageBucket.put(r2Key, serialized, {
1151:     httpMetadata: {
1152:       contentType: 'application/json',
1153:     },
1154:   });
1155:   const ref = await createReviewContextBlobReference(env.DB, {
1156:     id: contextId,
1157:     reviewId: review.id,
1158:     workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
1159:     deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
1160:     r2Key,
1161:     byteSize: new TextEncoder().encode(serialized).byteLength,
1162:     estimatedTokens: contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens,
1163:   });
1164: 
1165:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1166:     reviewId: review.id,
1167:     eventType: 'review_context_stored',
1168:     payload: {
1169:       contextId: ref.id,
1170:       r2Key: ref.r2Key,
1171:       totalFilesIncluded: contextPayload.stats.totalFilesIncluded,
1172:       totalBytesIncluded: contextPayload.stats.totalBytesIncluded,
1173:       estimatedTokens: contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens,
1174:     },
1175:   });
1176: 
1177:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1178:     reviewId: review.id,
1179:     eventType: 'review_context_assembly_succeeded',
1180:     payload: {
1181:       checkpointId,
1182:       sessionId,
1183:       changedFileCount: changedPaths.length,
1184:       contextId: ref.id,
1185:     },
1186:   });
1187: 
1188:   return contextPayload;
1189: }

1191: async function loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
1192:   env: Env,
1193:   workspaceId: string,
1194:   operationId: string | null,
1195:   reviewDiffArtifactId: string | null
1196: ): Promise<{ source: 'artifact_patch'; artifactId: string; patch: string } | null> {
1197:   const getArtifactObject = async (objectKey: string): Promise<R2ObjectBody | null> => {
1198:     const fromArtifacts = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(objectKey) : null;
1199:     if (fromArtifacts) {
1200:       return fromArtifacts;
1201:     }
1202:     return env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(objectKey) : null;
1203:   };
1204: 
1205:   if (reviewDiffArtifactId) {
1206:     const reviewArtifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, reviewDiffArtifactId);
1207:     if (reviewArtifact && reviewArtifact.artifact.type === 'patch') {
1208:       const object = await getArtifactObject(reviewArtifact.objectKey);
1209:       if (!object) {
1210:         return null;
1211:       }
1212:       return {
1213:         source: 'artifact_patch',
1214:         artifactId: reviewDiffArtifactId,
1215:         patch: await object.text(),
1216:       };
1217:     }
1218:   }
1219: 
1220:   if (!operationId) {
1221:     return null;
1222:   }
1223: 
1224:   const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
1225:   if (!operation || operation.type !== 'export_patch' || operation.status !== 'succeeded') {
1226:     return null;
1227:   }
1228: 
1229:   const result = asRecord(operation.result);
1230:   const artifactId = typeof result.artifactId === 'string' ? result.artifactId.trim() : '';
1231:   if (!artifactId) {
1232:     return null;
1233:   }
1234: 
1235:   const artifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, artifactId);
1236:   if (!artifact || artifact.artifact.type !== 'patch') {
1237:     return null;
1238:   }
1239: 
1240:   const object = await getArtifactObject(artifact.objectKey);
1241:   if (!object) {
1242:     return null;
1243:   }
1244: 
1245:   return {
1246:     source: 'artifact_patch',
1247:     artifactId,
1248:     patch: await object.text(),
1249:   };
1250: }

1252: async function buildWorkspaceDeploymentReport(
1253:   env: Env,
1254:   review: ReviewRunResponse,
1255:   payload: Record<string, unknown>,
1256:   reviewContext: ReviewContext
1257: ): Promise<ReviewReport> {
1258:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId);
1259:   if (!deployment) {
1260:     throw new Error(`Deployment not found for review target ${review.deploymentId}`);
1261:   }
1262: 
1263:   const deploymentRequest = (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, review.deploymentId)) ?? {};
1264:   const deploymentEvents = await listWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId, 0, 500);
1265:   const reviewPolicy = asRecord(payload.policy);
1266:   const reviewFormat = asRecord(payload.format);
1267:   const reviewAnalysisModel = resolveReviewAnalysisModel(payload, env);
1268:   const result = asRecord(deployment.result);
1269:   const resultProvenance = asRecord(result.provenance);
1270:   const resultArtifact = asRecord(result.artifact);
1271:   const requestValidation = asRecord(deploymentRequest.validation);
1272:   const requestProvenance = mergeProvenance(asRecord(deploymentRequest.provenance), asRecord(payload.provenance));
1273:   const intentSessionContext = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.intentSessionContext)).slice(0, 8);
1274:   const provenanceTaskId = typeof resultProvenance.taskId === 'string'
1275:     ? resultProvenance.taskId
1276:     : typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string'
1277:       ? requestProvenance.taskId
1278:       : null;
1279:   const provenanceTask = provenanceTaskId ? await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, review.workspaceId, provenanceTaskId) : null;
1280:   const taskResult = asRecord(provenanceTask?.result);
1281:   const severityThreshold = typeof reviewPolicy.severityThreshold === 'string' ? reviewPolicy.severityThreshold : 'low';
1282:   const maxFindings = parsePositiveInteger(reviewPolicy.maxFindings, 100, 500);
1283:   const includeProvenance = parseBoolean(reviewPolicy.includeProvenance, true);
1284:   const includeValidationEvidence = parseBoolean(reviewPolicy.includeValidationEvidence, true);
1285:   const includeMarkdownSummary = parseBoolean(reviewFormat.includeMarkdownSummary, true);
1286: 
1287:   const baseGoal =
1288:     typeof provenanceTask?.prompt === 'string' && provenanceTask.prompt.trim()
1289:       ? provenanceTask.prompt.trim()
1290:       : typeof requestProvenance.note === 'string' && requestProvenance.note.trim()
1291:         ? requestProvenance.note.trim()
1292:       : `Assess workspace deployment ${review.deploymentId} for review-first handoff readiness.`;
1293:   const baseConstraints = [
1294:     'Non-mutating review only.',
1295:     `Target limited to ${review.target.type}.`,
1296:     requestValidation.runTestsIfPresent === false
1297:       ? 'Tests were not required during deployment validation.'
1298:       : 'Tests were eligible during deployment validation.',
1299:     requestValidation.runBuildIfPresent === false
1300:       ? 'Build validation was not required during deployment validation.'
1301:       : 'Build validation was eligible during deployment validation.',
1302:   ];
1303:   const baseDecisions = [
1304:     `Deployment provider: ${deployment.provider}.`,
1305:     `Review mode: ${review.mode}.`,
1306:     provenanceTask ? `Source task model: ${provenanceTask.model}.` : '',
1307:     typeof taskResult.summary === 'string' && taskResult.summary.trim() ? `Source task summary: ${taskResult.summary.trim()}.` : '',
1308:     typeof resultProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1309:       ? `Deployment trigger: ${resultProvenance.trigger}.`
1310:       : typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1311:         ? `Deployment trigger: ${requestProvenance.trigger}.`
1312:         : 'Deployment trigger was not recorded.',
1313:     parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds).length > 0
1314:       ? `Related Entire sessions: ${parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds).join(', ')}.`
1315:       : '',
1316:     intentSessionContext.length > 0 ? `Prompt-history context excerpts provided: ${intentSessionContext.length}.` : '',
1317:   ];
1318: 
1319:   const heuristicFindings = buildHeuristicFindings(review, deploymentEvents);
1320:   const analysisEvidence = buildEvidence(deploymentEvents, deployment, resultArtifact, true);
1321:   const provenanceOperationId = typeof resultProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1322:     ? resultProvenance.operationId
1323:     : typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1324:       ? requestProvenance.operationId
1325:       : null;
1326:   const reviewDiffArtifactId = typeof resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
1327:     ? resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId
1328:     : typeof resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
1329:       ? resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
1330:       : typeof requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
1331:         ? requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
1332:         : null;
1333:   const authoritativeDiff = await loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
1334:     env,
1335:     review.workspaceId,
1336:     provenanceOperationId,
1337:     reviewDiffArtifactId
1338:   );
1339:   let agentAnalysis: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof runWorkspaceDeploymentAgentAnalysis>> = null;
1340:   const reviewAgentEnabled = Boolean((env.AGENT_SDK_URL ?? '').trim());
1341:   const deploymentSourceBundleKey =
1342:     typeof resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey === 'string' && resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
1343:       ? resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
1344:       : deployment.sourceBundleKey ?? null;
1345:   const promptGoal = provenanceTask?.prompt?.trim() || baseGoal;
1346:   if (reviewAgentEnabled && deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
1347:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1348:       reviewId: review.id,
1349:       eventType: 'review_analysis_agent_started',
1350:       payload: {
1351:         provider: 'cloudflare_agents_sdk',
1352:         model: reviewAnalysisModel,
1353:       },
1354:     });
1355: 
1356:     agentAnalysis = await runWorkspaceDeploymentAgentAnalysis(env, {
1357:       reviewId: review.id,
1358:       workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
1359:       deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
1360:       deploymentSandboxId: `review-snapshot-${review.id}`,
1361:       sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
1362:       modelOverride: reviewAnalysisModel,
1363:       authoritativeDiffSnapshot: authoritativeDiff
1364:         ? {
1365:             source: authoritativeDiff.source,
1366:             artifactId: authoritativeDiff.artifactId,
1367:             patch: authoritativeDiff.patch,
1368:           }
1369:         : undefined,
1370:       goal: promptGoal,
1371:       constraints: baseConstraints,
1372:       decisions: baseDecisions.filter(Boolean),
1373:       intentSessionContext,
1374:       evidenceCatalog: analysisEvidence.map((item) => ({
1375:         id: item.id,
1376:         type: item.type,
1377:         label: item.label,
1378:         status: item.status,
1379:       })),
1380:       deploymentSummary: {
1381:         provider: deployment.provider,
1382:         deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
1383:         validationSummary: JSON.stringify(requestValidation),
1384:       },
1385:       reviewContext,
1386:       rootListing: {},
1387:       diffSnapshot: {},
1388:       onLifecycleEvent: async (eventType, eventPayload) => {
1389:         await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1390:           reviewId: review.id,
1391:           eventType,
1392:           payload: eventPayload,
1393:         });
1394:       },
1395:     });
1396: 
1397:     if (!agentAnalysis) {
1398:       throw new Error('Review analysis did not produce output.');
1399:     }
1400: 
1401:     if (agentAnalysis.validation.fallbackApplied) {
1402:       throw new Error(
1403:         `Review analysis produced non-authoritative fallback output (${agentAnalysis.validation.fallbackReason ?? 'unknown'}).`
1404:       );
1405:     }
1406: 
1407:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1408:       reviewId: review.id,
1409:       eventType: 'review_analysis_agent_completed',
1410:       payload: {
1411:         provider: agentAnalysis.provider,
1412:         model: agentAnalysis.model,
1413:         stepsExecuted: agentAnalysis.stepsExecuted,
1414:         findingCount: agentAnalysis.findings.length,
1415:       },
1416:     });
1417:   }
1418: 
1419:   if (reviewAgentEnabled && !deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
1420:     throw new Error('Deployment snapshot unavailable; review analysis cannot proceed without source bundle.');
1421:   }
1422: 
1423:   if (reviewAgentEnabled && !agentAnalysis) {
1424:     throw new Error('Review analysis did not produce output.');
1425:   }
1426: 
1427:   const severityFloor = REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK[severityThreshold as ReviewSeverity] ?? REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK.low;

549:     toolPolicy.maxCommandTimeoutMs
550:   );
551: 
552:   await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
553:     workspaceId,
554:     taskId: task.id,
555:     eventType: 'task_started',
556:     payload: {
557:       provider: task.provider,
558:       model: task.model,
559:       attemptCount: task.attemptCount,
560:       maxSteps: task.maxSteps,
561:     },
562:   });
563: 
564:   for (let step = 1; step <= task.maxSteps; step += 1) {
565:     if (await isCancelRequested(env, workspaceId, task.id)) {
566:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, task.id, 'cancelled', {
567:         workspaceId,
568:         result: { reason: 'cancel_requested', step },
569:         errorCode: null,
570:         errorMessage: null,
571:       });
572:       try {
573:         await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
574:           workspaceId,
575:           taskId: task.id,
576:           eventType: 'task_cancelled',
577:           payload: { step },
578:         });
579:       } catch {
580:         // Best-effort event append after terminal status.
581:       }
582:       return;
583:     }
584: 
585:     const action = await provider.next({
586:       prompt: task.prompt,
587:       model: task.model,
588:       maxSteps: task.maxSteps,
589:       step,
590:       history,
591:     });
592: 
593:     if (action.type === 'final') {
594:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, task.id, 'succeeded', {
595:         workspaceId,
596:         result: { summary: action.summary, stepsExecuted: step - 1 },
597:         errorCode: null,
598:         errorMessage: null,
599:       });
600:       try {
601:         await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
602:           workspaceId,
603:           taskId: task.id,
604:           eventType: 'task_succeeded',
605:           payload: { summary: action.summary, stepsExecuted: step - 1 },
606:         });
607:       } catch {
608:         // Best-effort event append after terminal status.
609:       }
610:       return;
611:     }
612: 
613:     await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
614:       workspaceId,
615:       taskId: task.id,
616:       eventType: 'tool_call_started',
617:       payload: {
618:         step,
619:         tool: action.tool,
620:       },
621:     });
622: 
623:     const toolOutput = await executeTool(sandbox, action, maxCommandTimeoutMs, toolPolicy);
624:     history.push({ role: 'assistant', content: `tool:${action.tool}` });
625:     history.push({ role: 'tool', tool: action.tool, output: toolOutput });
626: 
627:     await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
628:       workspaceId,
629:       taskId: task.id,
630:       eventType: 'tool_call_completed',
631:       payload: {
632:         step,
633:         tool: action.tool,
634:         output: toolOutput,
635:       },
636:     });
637:   }
638: 
639:   throw new PolicyError('max_steps_exceeded', `Task exceeded maximum step count (${task.maxSteps})`);
640: }
641: 
642: export async function processWorkspaceTask(env: Env, workspaceId: string, taskId: string): Promise<void> {
643:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceTaskForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
644:   if (!claimed) {
645:     const existing = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
646:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
647:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace task is already running; defer redelivery');
648:     }
649:     return;
650:   }
651:   let task: WorkspaceTaskResponse | null = null;
652:   try {
653:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
654:     if (!flags.workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled) {
655:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'failed', {
656:         workspaceId,
657:         errorCode: 'workspace_agent_runtime_disabled',
658:         errorMessage: 'Workspace agent runtime is disabled',
659:       });
660:       await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
661:         workspaceId,
662:         taskId,
663:         eventType: 'task_failed',
664:         payload: {
665:           code: 'workspace_agent_runtime_disabled',
666:           message: 'Workspace agent runtime is disabled',
667:         },
668:       });
669:       return;
670:     }
671: 
672:     task = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
673:     if (!task) {
674:       return;
675:     }
676: 
677:     const payload = await getWorkspaceTaskRequestPayload(env.DB, taskId);
678:     const toolPolicyInput = await getWorkspaceTaskToolPolicy(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
679:     if (!payload) {
680:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'failed', {
681:         workspaceId,
682:         errorCode: 'task_not_found',
683:         errorMessage: 'Workspace task payload no longer exists',
684:       });
685:       return;
686:     }
687: 
688:     const toolPolicy = normalizeToolPolicy(toolPolicyInput);
689:     await executeWorkspaceTask(env, workspaceId, task, payload, toolPolicy);
690:   } catch (error) {
691:     const freshTask = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
692:     const attemptCount = freshTask?.attemptCount ?? task?.attemptCount ?? 0;
693:     const maxRetries = freshTask?.maxRetries ?? task?.maxRetries ?? 0;
694: 
695:     if (freshTask?.cancelRequestedAt) {
696:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'cancelled', {
697:         workspaceId,
698:         result: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
699:         errorCode: null,
700:         errorMessage: null,
701:       });
702:       await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
703:         workspaceId,
704:         taskId,
705:         eventType: 'task_cancelled',
706:         payload: { reason: 'cancel_requested' },
707:       });
708:       return;
709:     }
710: 
711:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
712:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'failed', {
713:         workspaceId,
714:         errorCode: error.code,
715:         errorMessage: error.message,
716:       });
717:       await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
718:         workspaceId,
719:         taskId,
720:         eventType: 'task_failed',
721:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message },
722:       });
723:       return;
724:     }
725: 
726:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
727:       await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'queued', {
728:         workspaceId,
729:         startedAt: null,
730:         finishedAt: null,
731:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
732:         errorMessage: sanitizeErrorMessage(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)),
733:       });
734:       await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
735:         workspaceId,
736:         taskId,
737:         eventType: 'task_retry_scheduled',
738:         payload: {
739:           attemptCount,
740:           maxRetries,
741:         },
742:       });
743:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace task transient failure; retry requested');
744:     }
745: 
746:     const message = sanitizeErrorMessage(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
747:     await updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(env.DB, taskId, 'failed', {
748:       workspaceId,
749:       errorCode: 'task_execution_failed',
750:       errorMessage: message,
751:     });
752:     await appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(env.DB, {
753:       workspaceId,
754:       taskId,
755:       eventType: 'task_failed',
756:       payload: {
757:         code: 'task_execution_failed',
758:         message,
759:       },
760:     });
761:   }
762: }
763: 
764: export function shouldRetryWorkspaceTaskError(error: unknown): boolean {
765:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
766:     return true;
767:   }
768: 
769:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
770:   if (isTransientFailure(message)) {
771:     return true;
772:   }
773: 
774:   return /(d1|database is locked|sqlite_busy|temporarily unavailable|connection reset)/i.test(message);
775: }

</content>

1750: export async function runReviewInlineWithRetries(
1751:   env: Env,
1752:   reviewId: string,

1754:   options?: ReviewRunExecutionOptions
1755: ): Promise<void> {

1758:       await processReviewRun(env, reviewId, options);
1759:     } catch {
1760:       // Retry scheduling is inferred from persisted status.
1761:     }

1764:     if (!latest) {
1765:       return;
1766:     }
1767:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
1768:       return;
1769:     }
1770:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
1771:       return;
1772:     }
1773:   }
1774: 
1775:   const latest = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1776:   if (latest?.status === 'queued' && latest.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled') {
1777:     const message = `Review ${reviewId} remained queued after inline retries`;
1778:     await replaceReviewFindings(env.DB, reviewId, []);
1779:     await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'failed', {
1780:       report: null,
1781:       markdownSummary: null,
1782:       errorCode: 'review_execution_failed',
1783:       errorMessage: message,
1784:     });
1785:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1786:       reviewId,
1787:       eventType: 'review_failed',
1788:       payload: {
1789:         code: 'review_execution_failed',
1790:         message,
1791:       },
1792:     });
1793:   }
1794: }

1796: export function shouldRetryReviewError(error: unknown): boolean {
1797:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1798:     return true;
1799:   }
1800: 
1801:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1802:   return transientReviewFailure(message);

parts.text:
I reviewed all current uncommitted changes (`git diff`, `git diff --cached`, and `git status --short`) and then read the full contents of each modified file for context.

I did not find any definite bugs in the changed code.

- The new branch-fallback context flow is consistently threaded through CLI preflight/create, deployment provenance, worker normalization, report assembly, and report UI rendering.
- Error handling additions for Cloudflare Worker-to-Worker fetch restriction (`1042`) are coherent with the wrangler compatibility flag update.
- Type/interface updates across `cli`, `worker`, and `report-ui` are aligned.
- Added tests cover the new fallback behavior and stricter output validation paths, and the relevant package test suites pass.

If you want, I can do a second pass focused only on behavioral-change risk (not just correctness), e.g. idempotency-key behavior changes from adding `contextResolution` fields.
